use_codes.desc: METHOD OF MR IMAGING OF A MAMMAL

indications.text:
ABLAVAR is indicated for use as a contrast agent in magnetic resonance angiography (MRA) to evaluate aortoiliac occlusive disease
(AIOD) in adults with known or suspected peripheral vascular disease [see Clinical Studies (14)].

ABLAVAR is indicated for use as a contrast agent in magnetic resonance angiography (MRA) to evaluate aortoiliac occlusive disease
(AIOD) in adults with known or suspected peripheral vascular disease [see Clinical Studies (14)].
